title: ziziphus soporifera
intro: Ziziphus soporifera, also known as Wu Zusu or Suanzaoren, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and sedative effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also dried and used as a traditional Chinese medicine ingredient.
